/usr/bin/c++ -pthread CMakeFiles/mion_tests_v2_input.dir/tests/test_credits_scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mion_tests_v2_input.dir/tests/test_dungeon_controllers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mion_tests_v2_input.dir/tests/test_gamepad_input.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mion_tests_v2_input.dir/tests/test_gaps_v2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mion_tests_v2_input.dir/tests/test_keybind_config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mion_tests_v2_input.dir/tests/test_legacy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mion_tests_v2_input.dir/tests/test_locale.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mion_tests_v2_input.dir/tests/test_plan.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mion_tests_v2_input.dir/tests/test_player_action_v2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mion_tests_v2_input.dir/tests/test_scenes_v2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mion_tests_v2_input.dir/tests/test_v2_input_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mion_tests_v2_input.dir/src/core/audio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mion_tests_v2_input.dir/src/core/input.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mion_tests_v2_input.dir/src/core/register_scenes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mion_tests_v2_input.dir/src/vendor/stb_image_impl.cpp.o -o mion_tests_v2_input  _deps/sdl3-build/libSDL3.a -lm
